58mcrregv6hv34ovstk6q1lml8.summary: You must address the core operational friction points identified in the May 26 Tech BOD meeting—specifically the ownership gaps in the end-to-end software development lifecycle and the proliferation of redundant monitoring tools. The architecture team needs to transition to a more hands-on discipline—overcoming lab environment access issues and capacity constraints to deliver direct value. Immediate alignment is required on outstanding tasks—including resolving the residency team issue with Michelle Carter and restarting the Pay Claim telemetry initiative.
tasks: Review analysis feedback from Noisy and Casey to establish the current state of active initiatives.
Retrieve Bricanti's previous recommendation analysis—integrating those findings back into the active proposal.
Partner with Michelle Carter to resolve the MII residency issue prior to the Thursday deadline.
Restart conversations with the Pay Claim team—targeting the delivery of Grafana dashboards with fifteen real-time metrics within two weeks.
58mcrregv6hv34ovstk6q1lml8.title: TF Standup

t1plr8h3q8jtq6s3dis4hgh1q4.summary: No matched work notes exist for two-way SMS topics—you must establish a baseline with Corey during this brief sync. Address the primary pillars of two-way SMS integration—compliance guardrails, carrier opt-in rules, and message routing latency. Outline these missing operational requirements immediately—this approach forces Corey to provide the specific documentation you lack.
tasks: Ask Corey for the latest API documentation regarding the two-way SMS channel.
Define the compliance requirements for user opt-in and opt-out flows.
Establish a timeline for the integration phase with external carriers.
Schedule a follow-up session to review the technical architecture once documents are received.
t1plr8h3q8jtq6s3dis4hgh1q4.title: Quick Sync on 2-way SMS Channel with Corey

rtokmkgmd7hdmqirdhnr2keg88.summary: Prepare to tackle the Amber-status claims onboarding pipeline—currently stalled by heavy vendor volumes and low architect priority—and address team acclimation following the reporting structure shifts under Gunjin. Drive the automation of work assignment by leveraging the new Claims Status Communication AI workshop. Push your preferred technical direction—specifically transitioning to homegrown Snowflake visualization tools and prioritizing internal AWS communication platforms over costly third-party vendors like Hi Marley.
tasks: Address the Amber status of auto insurance claims by accelerating the onboarding pipeline for the pending twenty-five plus vendors.
Monitor team acclimation and performance management under Gunjin following the transition of Gavadell's direct reports.
Track the progress of the Claims Status Communication AI workshop to streamline automated work assignments and status updates.
Advocate for the internal AWS conversational platform over third-party alternatives during upcoming business line pilot discussions.
Champion the transition to custom Snowflake and VS Code visualization dashboards to replace high-cost Tableau and ServiceNow instances.
rtokmkgmd7hdmqirdhnr2keg88.title: Sync with Mark | Rebecca

6lgvch0tscjlsvh8bqhj5nb6c0.summary: Evaluate the architectural pushback on CRMA reporting—you must address Suresh's request to bypass Snowflake's data latency—which threatens metric alignment for incentive compensations. Track the transition plan for Matt's sudden departure—ensuring you move responsibilities to Vince—to stabilize mid-career architect morale. Prepare for Mark's potential absences—due to his ongoing treatments—by aligning on the upcoming Horizontal Planning meeting details.
tasks: Oppose the direct Salesforce-to-CRMA reporting bypass—citing the risk of metric mismatches in incentive compensation.
Confirm the transition of Matt's responsibilities to Vince—addressing mid-career architect retention and capacity concerns.
Review the real-time Kafka streaming timeline with Snowflake's data team—mitigating the four-day latency on legacy policy data.
Establish coverage protocols for Mark's upcoming medical absences—ensuring leadership continuity during the DNS transformation.
6lgvch0tscjlsvh8bqhj5nb6c0.title: Sync with Mark | Amit
